name: Stealth
description: Penetrate the sanctum and extract the hidden Object before alert protocols lock down the site. Move unseen, or trigger the alarms that seal your fate.

victoryConditions.description: Immediate victory for extracting the Authentic Object
Defender victory if Lockdown triggers before Object extraction

scoringRules.description: +3 VP and win for extracting Authentic Object
+1 VP for Decoy extraction (+2 Alert Level)

specialRules.name: Hidden Object
specialRules.description: The Object is Hidden at placement

specialRules.name: Alert Level
specialRules.description: Starts at 0. Increases via Revelation (+1), Attacks (+2), or Decoys (+2). If threshold reached, game ends - Defender wins unless Authentic Object was extracted

specialRules.name: Identification
specialRules.description: Roll 1d6 when Object found: 1-3 = Authentic (+3 VP and win); 4-6 = Decoy (+1 VP, +2 Alert Level)
